dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (LONG in uptrends, SHORT in downtrends). Entry conditions check for MA alignment (200MA below 20MA for uptrends, above for downtrends) and price approaching the 200MA as support/resistance. Exit conditions use MA crossover as reversal signals. Timeframe specification (5m, 15m, 60m) cannot be enforced in this rule format but should be applied at backtest configuration level. Used sma_200 and sma_20 as allowed equivalents for 200MA and 20MA.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal is context-dependent (LONG in uptrends, SHORT in downtrends). Entry conditions check for MA alignment (200MA below 20MA for uptrends, above for downtrends) and price approaching the 200MA as support/resistance. Exit conditions use MA crossover as reversal signals. Timeframe specification (5m, 15m, 60m) cannot be enforced in this rule format but should be applied at backtest configuration level. Used sma_200 and sma_20 as allowed equivalents for 200MA and 20MA.

source_rule_text: In uptrends, trade when 200MA is below 20MA; in downtrends, trade when 200MA is above 20MA. Use 200MA as resistance in uptrends and support in downtrends on 5-minute, 15-minute, and 60-minute charts.
